phrasings.note: privilege_scan default Bash + Stop override illegal; steer (P0-1 cluster)

provenance.known_limitation_note: Scenario expects 'steered' because block@Stop is downgraded to audit and the operator should be steered away. But the flow emits ready_to_save=True alongside the enforce_downgraded_to_audit feasibility warning, so the runner saves the policy. Candidate runner gap: when feasibility.code=enforce_downgraded_to_audit the flow should stop at the warning turn rather than proceeding to ready_to_save. Alternatively the scenario spec should accept 'saved' as the outcome.
